top_posts.caption:
Officially on Forbes.

I have a lot to talk about, which i will soon when it’s officially announced. But for now i keep it at a few words.

Can’t be more grateful for everything that happened the past 3 years, this was far from reality.

Even though i keep my circle small, thanks to my family, friends & team this becomes reality ❤️

I choose the hardest path every single time. 

Not for the story, but because the man i’m building can only be forged where most people refuse to go.

I’ve been ignored, I’ve been lost, I’ve made decisions that made zero sense to everyone around me and had to carry the weight of that alone.

There were nights where the only thing keeping me going was a version of myself that didn’t exist yet, a man i could see so clearly in my head but hadn’t become.

And instead of letting that break me, i used it as fuel every single day.

I didn’t have friends, I didn’t have a safety net, I didn’t have anyone telling me this was going to work. 

3 years later that decision is staring back at me from a place i once thought was reserved for people who were born into this.

I built every single step with my own hands while most people were still debating whether to start.

This is what it looks like when you refuse to quit on yourself. 

Not for one week, not for a year, but every single day for three years without a single guarantee it would pay off.

I have a small circle, and genuinely want to show gratitude for those who believed in me when this was all just an idea.

- Nik

This is how I made $2.5M as a 21 year old consultant.

Took me 2 years but I’ll teach it to you in less than 134 seconds.

Streamlined structure, north of $25m in client revenue, working with top tier clients that give me case studies no one in the market can replicate.

And if I had to start over, this is the exact blueprint that I will follow.

First, find the right vehicle.

If you want to move quick, you have to find the right vehicle that will get you there at lightning speed.

Study framing, positioning, market messaging to target the right avatar for your product.

Second, leverage systems, AI and content.
Multiply your throughput to produce results while reducing friction.

You can never scale a business that runs with you working in the trenches.

Third, iterate and replicate.
If you implement the right systems you should be able to produce results. 

Be obsessed with data, track everything accurately, find pros and cons.

If something doesn’t work, iterate.
If something works, replicate.

A golden fulfillment cannot replicate any marketing strategy.

Leverage social media with the right messaging to precisely target your ICP.

But this will all only be possible, if you have a great offer, product, and infrastructure.
If you’re struggling in your business right now, you’re not alone.

I used to clock in 80 hours a week doing $30-$40k/mo working with needy clients.

You know to yourself that the only solution to your problems is getting the right information, implementation, and experience.

It was the reason I was able to take myself out of the repetitive side of the business and enjoy the fruits of my labor.

To the point that I can host masterminds and client retreats for my clients anywhere in the world.

I flew out my editor from the Philippines straight to Dubai giving him the time of his life, which are the moments that truly make me realize twice why i’m doing all this.

I’m grateful for the amazing clients I’m working with and the team that supports running a multiple 7-figure operation.

Just shy of 2,5 years ago i could’ve never imagined this could become reality.

No crazy CTA, just send me a dm when you are ready to pay in full.

- Nik

comment “form” and i’ll send you the 10 questions necessary to ask every client when they get onboard.

the most valuable data that will give you the best insight in how to attract “more” similar buyers.

happy to help with any q’s in dm’s to personalize it to your situation.

what a game we play.

can’t be more grateful for how fast the last 2,5 years have gone.
I spent $10.000 flying out a stranger from the Philippines to Dubai.

Bought my dream car at 21.

Flew out my editor from philippines to Dubai this month.

Made $171.000 profit in May.

A thought that could’ve never came to mind when i was working as a roofer 2,5 years ago.

All because of a pre-engineerd 3-step sales machine.

- One offer, one funnel, one setter
- Ads built for conversion, not fame
- A content ecosystem + DM closes

Scaling is about designing a machine your mind can’t sabotage, because it drives on data.

No second-guessing. No attachment to outcomes.

Just numbers — inputs, outputs, and decisions made at speed.

I’m writing this while i’m sitting at a roundtable with 8 clients in Greece, brainstorming about business.

Organizing these trips makes me realize what i’m doing it all for.

Comment “PIF” and i’ll shoot over a video breaking down the process of how you could build a $900k/year profit consulting business.
hate me or love me, you watched… that’s all you could do.

Elias scaled from $3,5k to $20k/mo in 14 days 🤝

He was stuck below $5k/mo tor over 6 months because he didn’t had a predictable system booking him appointments.

After a combination of outbound, organic & ads his calendar stacked up to 70-80 qualified calls a month with abnormal speed.

Watch the full interview, check “Client Testimonials” playlist on my Youtube channel: Niksetting.
(online soon)

Or dm me and i can send it privately.

follow @niksetting👇

building an 8 figure company is not easy…

the only thing that matters is your team. they build your business, show up & dedicate every single day.

to build something life-lasting it needs more, you must set expectations, boundaries & be direct with your communication.

some might like this video, for others it’s shocking. 

we’ve got a team of under 10 people, our culture is like a family.

we will do everything for each other, meaning if you work with someone for 8 months it’s sometimes hard to let that person go.

I think it’s important for me to show this because everyone is always showing the “beautiful” side of things.

a true leader doesn’t direct, he leads, empowers & takes responsibility.

This is how I made $100,000 in a single week.

All backed by data, tracked across every department of the company to give you the step-by-step layout.

The biggest shift came from narrowing the focus.

Selling to a niche audience brought in sophisticated buyers who respect my process and pay in full.

Friday $31.5day, Sunday $26.5k day, all with:

One offer. One message. One funnel.

Everything pointed toward a clear outcome.

I used a single Instagram ad funnel targeting M.O.F traffic, built with messaging that directly hit our ICP.

Massive leverage was created within the delivery because we built a system where input creates high success rates and long-term clients.

Having a upsell rate of 78% creating lots of revenue in the back-end.

The kind of fulfillment that does the selling for you.

Data gave clarity and speed to every decision we made.

I recorded a full breakdown on how I:
- Track each department inside my company
- Sell a 5-figure offer to one market
- Scale through one proven Instagram ad funnel

Comment “100k” 

and I’ll show you how I create predictability behind every $100k week.

and if you are ready to PIF, just dm me and i’ll shoot over the payment link.

Dubai Client Retreat

I want to express my gratitude for everything that happened in my life the last 2 years.

Without all my amazing clients, i wouldn’t be able to achieve this.

Cape Town Retreat is coming up.

Thank you ❤️

Capetown Client Retreat.

After months of hard work, celebrating with the people you have achieved amazing results with is incredible.

I will never stop doing what i do, thanks to all my clients for giving me this life.

🙏

A moment to share gratitude to the amazing clients that i have traveled with over the past year.

The caliber of clients i work with is above normal, most become friends and they stay loyal to being a client of mine, some for over 1 year now.

When you build an amazing product and also give them an amazing experience, they will never leave you no matter what.

We started with the first client retreat in Greece, second one in Dubai, now the third one just ended in Capetown.

I have met over 50+ clients in the past 1,5 year in over 12 different countries.

Something i could’ve never expected 2 years ago.

Thanks everyone for supporting, whether you are a client or just following.
time for the next chapter.

High-ticket clients, the key to scale past $100k/mo.

Follow @niksetting👇

Greece Client Retreat

Best trip of my life.

I’m grateful, a little over a year ago i was working for $1,2k/mo as a roofer, now i travel with all my amazing clients all over the world.

Life can change fast, it’s just the start 🫶
sun > snow = best combo
2023 was just the start 🧩

sun > snow = best combo
2023 was just the start 🧩

Life can adapt quickly if you can make the right decisions based on general information. ✈️

Don’t wait, create…

The last 3 months was life changing...

I went to portugal for 2 weeks, having the best time of my life while building on an exceptional product.

After that we flew to the greece mountains for a month

Sure enough, every day after work I’d swim in the pool and that made me think..

My motivation to succeed was selfish, & for good reason.

But now that I’m independent & free to do whatever I want, that motivation has shifted direction.

It’s now shifted towards creating impact, meaning, & purpose.

Towards building something truly great that changes the lives of my bloodline, changes the lives of my clients, & change the lives of the less fortunate.

And that me happier and more grateful then ever

Building something multiple people can benefit from is truly the most beautiful thing there is.

You owe it to yourself

_raw_posts.caption:
building an 8 figure company is not easy…

the only thing that matters is your team. they build your business, show up & dedicate every single day.

to build something life-lasting it needs more, you must set expectations, boundaries & be direct with your communication.

some might like this video, for others it’s shocking. 

we’ve got a team of under 10 people, our culture is like a family.

we will do everything for each other, meaning if you work with someone for 8 months it’s sometimes hard to let that person go.

I think it’s important for me to show this because everyone is always showing the “beautiful” side of things.

a true leader doesn’t direct, he leads, empowers & takes responsibility.

I choose the hardest path every single time. 

Not for the story, but because the man i’m building can only be forged where most people refuse to go.

I’ve been ignored, I’ve been lost, I’ve made decisions that made zero sense to everyone around me and had to carry the weight of that alone.

There were nights where the only thing keeping me going was a version of myself that didn’t exist yet, a man i could see so clearly in my head but hadn’t become.

And instead of letting that break me, i used it as fuel every single day.

I didn’t have friends, I didn’t have a safety net, I didn’t have anyone telling me this was going to work. 

3 years later that decision is staring back at me from a place i once thought was reserved for people who were born into this.

I built every single step with my own hands while most people were still debating whether to start.

This is what it looks like when you refuse to quit on yourself. 

Not for one week, not for a year, but every single day for three years without a single guarantee it would pay off.

I have a small circle, and genuinely want to show gratitude for those who believed in me when this was all just an idea.

- Nik

what a game we play.

can’t be more grateful for how fast the last 2,5 years have gone.
